memory_cards.statement: Graph memory systems enable agents to preserve relationships between entities, not just isolated facts.
Provenance tracking is essential for graph memory systems to maintain trust and auditability.
Update semantics must be explicitly defined in graph memory systems to handle temporal evolution and versioning.
